positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a sleeping fox nestled among bioluminescent mushrooms and glowing forest flora, surrounded by gentle constellations. The style should be a blend of digital watercolor and storybook illustration, featuring deep jewel tones, soft pastel accents, and luminous glow effects. Include tiny fireflies and delicate vines. Concept: Cozy, magical, cottagecore, whimsical, ethereal, volumetric lighting, golden hour glow, highly detailed, Art Nouveau influences, trending on Pinterest, 8k, masterpiece.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, monochrome, harsh shadows, plastic, oversaturated, grainy
